title: Myanmar Morphotactics Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating morphotactics.yaml - Compound word POS pattern rules and frequency floors

compound_patterns.description: POS combination patterns that are valid in compound word synthesis

blocked_patterns.description: POS combination patterns that should never form valid compounds

frequency_floors.description: Minimum corpus frequency thresholds per POS pattern type

morphotactic_bonuses.description: Per-pattern confidence bonuses for compound word validation

compound_pattern_entry.description: A POS combination pattern for compound word validation

pattern.description: POS combination pattern (e.g., N+N, V+V, ADJ+N)

min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for this pattern
